chapter_title.en: Chapter on Companions in Travel and the Obligation of Mutual Rights Among Them

text: 2442 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «إِذَا صَحِبْتَ فَاصْحَبْ نَحْوَكَ وَ لاَ تَصْحَبْ مَنْ يَكْفِيكَ فَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ مَذَلَّةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2442 - Abu Ja‘far (as) said:
"If you travel with someone, travel with your equals, and do not accompany someone who takes care of your needs entirely, for that is a humiliation for the believer."
